text:
Artificial intelligence is changing the world of creativity. Today, AI can generate art, compose music, and even write stories. Some people find this exciting, while others worry that machines might replace human artists.

AI creates art by learning from thousands of images or songs and then combining them in new ways. However, human creativity comes from emotions, personal experiences, and imagination. A machine does not feel joy or sadness, so its work often lacks deeper meaning.

The best results happen when humans and AI work together. An artist might use AI to explore new ideas or a writer to overcome writer's block. In the end, AI is a useful tool, but true creativity still needs a human touch.
